client_construction.code: let consumer: StreamConsumer = ClientConfig::new().set("bootstrap.servers", brokers).set("group.id", group).set("enable.auto.commit", "false").create()?; consumer.subscribe(&[topic])?;

primary_operations.name: process
primary_operations.sdk_call: let msg = self.consumer.recv().await?; let payload = msg.payload().unwrap_or(&[]).to_vec(); self.consumer.commit_message(&msg, CommitMode::Async)?; Ok(payload)

code_style_notes: manual commit (enable.auto.commit=false) is the at-least-once pattern
CommitMode::Sync blocks until commit succeeds; Async fire-and-forget
